description: Originally launched on Ethereum in 2023, CharityCoin (CHARITY) is now on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time. Specifically designed to support charitable organizations and global humanitarian initiatives, ATC-20 CHARITY provides instant finality, ultra-low fees, AI contract capability, transparent fund management, and cross-border donations worldwide without delay, ensuring funds reach recipients immediately.
name: CharityCoin
